This is Nucleo in action

We are backed by
We work with the best hospitals in the US and worldwide
Our technology is powered by industry leaders

Our use cases

Nucleo's AI technology streamlines clinical workflows across three critical areas for oncology care.

01

Body composition and sarcopenia assessment

Automatic detection and quantification of fat and muscle mass in CT scans.

01

Body composition and sarcopenia assessment

Automatic detection and quantification of fat and muscle mass in CT scans.

02

Tumor Lesion Sizing

Precise and consistent measurement of tumor lesions in CT scans.

02

Tumor Lesion Sizing

Precise and consistent measurement of tumor lesions in CT scans.

03

Target vs Non-Target Lesion Classification

Automated classification of lesions according to RECIST criteria.

03

Target vs Non-Target Lesion Classification

Automated classification of lesions according to RECIST criteria.

Discover more
